channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dog fouling, 10th March
item.description:
Dogs are fouling all down our road, these photos are just between doors 64 - 44. It’s disgusting and something needs to be done, it’s worse than ever.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elm Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree requires pruning, 10th March
item.description:
First reported in October 2025, despite being a priority. Why is the tree on the other side of the roundabout being pruned today?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dogs in play area, 10th March
item.description:
I live opposite the play area of the park. I believe dogs are not allowed in that area but recently I noticed persons taking their dogs there. Has the rules changed .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 201, High Street, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Faulty Street lights, 10th March
item.description:
There ae 2 faulty street lights with the reference numbers PA03 and PA04 situated within the Ray Gunter House Sheltered Housing Unit , 4 Marsland Close, London SE17 3JX that are not working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marsland Close, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yellow barrier left abandoned, 10th March
item.description:
Yellow barrier left abandoned
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Laburnum Way, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive Fly Tip between railways, 10th March
item.description:
Huge quantity of rubbish has been tipped in this location. Visible from train but didn't have time to take a photograph.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ermine Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant fly tipping just off Passey Place, 10th March
item.description:
Constant fly tipping at the entrance to the car park just off Passey Place beside Save the Children

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Passey Place, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brick wall demolished causing a hazard., 10th March
item.description:
Since one end of Elm Road has been closed due to drainage repairs, a lot of vans and cars are having to do three point turns or using this small car park to turn around and someone’s knocked the wall over. For one it’s unsightly but more important, kids play on our road and will pick the bricks up and start chucking them around. This needs clearing up asap.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elm Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass cattered along the road, 10th March
item.description:
Looks like glass from broken car window scattered along the road by the kerb.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chesham Avenue, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard knocked over, 10th March
item.description:
The bollard on the corner has been struck and uprooted

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Hill, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant dog fouling down Sheldon Road, 10th March
item.description:
Constant dog fouling down Sheldon Road - signs or stencils need to be put up and people need to be fined as this is a school road and children use these pavements daily and the amount of dog fouling is terrible. I have seen many children and parents stepping in it and it's becoming a big issue now. Please can this be looked into.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2a, Sheldon Road, Upper Belvedere, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Racial language graffitied on wall, 10th March
item.description:
Racist language on wall has been there since we moved In last year. Please remove as highly offensive language

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Larch Way, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 10th March
item.description:
The car seems to have been abandoned. It’s parked about a foot from the kerb and is also right by the 314 bus stop.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Vale, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped household rubbish, 10th March
item.description:
Been there overnight

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Wellington Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 10th March
item.description:
There is a painting on the pub (facing the road near the bus stop. It has a white background. There is graffiti on the top right hand corner of the painting. The top right hand corner of the painting could do with painting over in white to restore the painting to how it was intended
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highgate Hill, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous Uneven Pavement, 10th March
item.description:
This part of Rothschild Street is dangerous to any pedestrian commuting, using this as a cut through or generally walking along the pavement. It is uncomfortable for pushchairs and anyone using a wheelchair or mobility scooter. Please send someone to assess and repair this stretch of pavement on Rothschild Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rothschild Street, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Diverted traffic from Green Lane, 10th March
item.description:
Diverted traffic from Green Lane into Edward Road. Adelaide Road and Alexander Road due to Road Works on Green Lane are causing dangerous driving and aggressive behaviour by drivers using these small roads for access back onto Green Lane. A serious accident to residents cars and possibly humans is likely. Our roads are not meant for heavy vehicles such as coaches. No proper road signs for diversion into the residential areas.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Adelaide Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urgent Repair Request: Faulty Lighting - Ethnard Road, Ledbury estate, 10th March
item.description:
Dear Repair Team, I am writing to formally report that the two lights located on the green space directly behind the maisonettes on Ethnard Road are currently out of order. These lights have been non-functional for some time. As our gardens face directly onto this space, the area is left in total darkness at night, which is causing significant concern regarding safety and security for all residents in these properties. Location details: please see below a map of the area to this email for your convenience. I have marked the exact locations of the two faulty lights with red crosses to ensure the repair team can identify them quickly. Image.png Could you please confirm receipt of this report and let me know when a technician is scheduled to attend? If possible, I would appreciate a reference number for this request so that I can track the progress of the repairs. Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter. Best regards, C
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ethnard Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole by traffic light on North corner of junction, 10th March
item.description:
Large pothole in road by the kerb. Buses and cars swerving to avoid it. danger to cyclists. It might be a sinkhole or a drain but it is so deep that it is hard to tell
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Magdala Avenue, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of pot holes but large one o/s 158 - 160 Days Lane, 10th March
item.description:
The large pot hole is so big that when vehicles drive over it it is making local residents properties shake. Please can this be looked into with a matter of urgency
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 163, Days Lane, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
